info.title: Tori API
info.description: Managed recurring billing engine built natively on Nomba. One API call starts a subscription. Everything after — dunning, renewals, recovery, ledger — is handled automatically.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, tokens, and account verification

tags.name: Security
tags.description: API keys, active sessions, and account security

tags.name: Plans
tags.description: Billing plans — pricing templates subscriptions are created against

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: The core billing relationship between a customer and a plan

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice records generated per billing cycle

tags.name: Finance
tags.description: Ledger, MRR/ARR, churn, dunning recovery, and the Recovery Command Center

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Outbound event delivery to your servers, and the inbound Nomba webhook

tags.name: Email Templates
tags.description: Merchant-branded billing emails sent to your customers

tags.name: Team
tags.description: Team members, roles, invitations, and the admin audit log

tags.name: Platform
tags.description: Server-to-server integration surface, authenticated with an X-API-Key

bearerAuth.description: Dashboard API. Obtain via POST /v1/auth/login or /v1/auth/register. Access tokens expire after 15 minutes; use POST /v1/auth/refresh to get a new one.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: Platform API. A tori_live_ key routes to Nomba production, a tori_test_ key routes to Nomba sandbox — determined entirely by the key prefix.

portalToken.name: token
portalToken.description: Short-lived (1 hour) customer self-service portal token, generated via GET /v1/platform/customers/{customer_id}/portal-token. May also be passed as an Authorization: Bearer header.

BadRequest.description: The request body or parameters failed validation

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist, or does not belong to the authenticated tenant

UnprocessableEntity.description: The request is well-formed but rejected by business logic (e.g. an invalid state transition)

Conflict.description: The resource already exists or conflicts with an existing one

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded — back off until X-Ratelimit-Reset

message.example: the requested resource does not exist

post.description: Creates a new Tori tenant account, generates a live and test API key pair, sends an email verification code via Resend, and returns JWT tokens immediately — no separate login step needed.
Authenticates with email and password, returns JWT tokens. After 5 failed attempts the account locks for 15 minutes.
Exchanges a refresh token (7-day validity) for a new 15-minute access token.
Revokes the current access token in Redis immediately — any subsequent request with it returns 401, even before it would have naturally expired.
Validates the 6-digit code emailed at registration and marks the tenant verified. Sends a welcome email on success.
Generates a fresh 6-digit code and deletes any unused codes for this tenant.

get.description: Returns the authenticated tenant's own account record.

patch.description: Updates the tenant's business name or account email. Omit a field to leave it unchanged.
Overrides the default retry schedule and behaviour for the tenant. Applies to every subscription the tenant owns.

get.description: Returns every session that has not expired or been revoked, for the currently authenticated tenant, newest-active first.

delete.description: Immediately kills one session. Any token tied to it is rejected on its very next request.

get.description: Returns the hint (prefix plus last 4 characters) for both the live and test key. The full key is never retrievable after creation.

post.summary: Create or replace the live API key
post.description: Generates a new live API key, replacing the existing one if present. The full key is shown exactly once.

post.summary: Create or replace the test API key
post.description: Generates a new test API key. Requests signed with it always hit Nomba sandbox regardless of server configuration.
Generates a new live key and immediately invalidates the current one.

delete.description: Revokes the live or test key. Revoking one does not affect the other.

post.description: Creates a pricing plan. Same handler as POST /v1/platform/plans, authenticated with a JWT instead of an API key.

get.description: Returns all plans for the account, sorted by creation date descending.
Fetches a single plan by ID.

patch.description: Updates a plan's name, description, amount, or trial length. Only affects new subscribers — existing subscriptions keep their original price.

delete.description: Deactivates a plan. New subscriptions cannot use it; existing subscribers are unaffected.

post.description: Creates a discount code redeemable by passing promo_code on POST /v1/platform/checkout.

discount_value.description: 1-100 for percentage, kobo amount (min 100) for fixed

get.description: Returns every promo code for the account, active and inactive, newest first.

delete.description: Soft delete — sets is_active to false. There is no hard delete; the code and its use_count history are retained.

get.description: Returns all 7 supported billing email events with current configuration. Uncustomised events return Tori's default copy rendered with sample data.

put.description: Configures one event's email — default or custom copy, enabled or disabled.

post.description: Sends the configured (or default) template to the tenant's own account email with sample billing data.

get.description: Returns all invoices for the account. Filter by status to find open, paid, or voided invoices.
Fetches a single invoice by ID.
Returns every invoice generated for one subscription.

post.description: Creates a customer. The checkout endpoint creates customers automatically — use this only to pre-create one before subscribing.

get.description: Returns all customers for the account, newest first. Pass external_id to look up by your own user ID instead.
Fetches a single customer by Tori ID.

patch.description: Updates a customer's name or email address.

post.description: Archives a customer record. Does not touch their subscriptions — cancel those separately first if needed.

get.description: Generates a short-lived (1 hour) portal token for customer self-service.

post.description: Identical flow to POST /v1/platform/checkout, authenticated with a JWT instead of an API key — used by the dashboard itself to start a subscription for a customer.

get.description: Returns real-time health scores (0-100) and churn predictions for all active subscriptions.
Subscription counts by state, MRR, revenue this month, charge success rate, and worker queue health, in one call.
Next month's expected revenue in low/mid/high estimates with a confidence level.
Net revenue grouped by calendar month for a date range.
Returns all ledger entries in a date range, newest first. The ledger is append-only — no entries are ever edited or deleted.
Aggregated totals (charged, refunded, credits, net) for a period. The source of the revenue dashboard's headline numbers.
Fetches a single ledger entry by ID.
Monthly recurring revenue for a given calendar month.
Annual recurring revenue — MRR for the given month multiplied by 12.
Percentage of subscriptions cancelled in a date range.
Total kobo successfully charged during a date range — revenue the dunning engine recovered.
Gross revenue, refunds, credits, and net revenue for a date range.
Splits every non-healthy subscription into at_risk, recovering, and recovered buckets with amounts at stake and recovery rail.

post.description: Creates a subscription for an existing customer and plan without a Nomba checkout session. No payment method is tokenised — use POST /v1/checkout for new signups instead.

get.description: Returns all subscriptions for the account. Filter by status to find everything in a specific billing state.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: TRIALING | ACTIVE | GRACE_PERIOD | PAST_DUE | DUNNING | PAUSED | SUSPENDED | CANCELLED

get.description: Fetches a single subscription by ID.

post.description: Cancels a subscription. By default schedules cancellation at current_period_end; pass immediate:true to revoke access now.
Pauses billing. No charges fire until resumed.
Resumes a paused subscription. Billing restarts on the next normal cycle.
Manually moves a SUSPENDED subscription back to ACTIVE — use after confirming payment out of band.

get.description: Returns the audit trail of status changes for a subscription, newest first.

patch.description: Changes the subscription's plan mid-cycle with exact proration. Both credit and charge are written to the ledger.

post.description: Generates a fresh Nomba checkout URL for a subscription with no payment method on file yet.
Refunds a subscription's most recent paid charge through Nomba and records a REFUND ledger entry.

amount.description: Kobo amount; omit for a full refund

post.description: Operator action from the Recovery Command Center. Queues an immediate payment retry instead of waiting for the next scheduled dunning attempt.
Marks the recovery rail as manual and fires a payment.action_required webhook with a fresh checkout link.
Registers a URL to receive webhook deliveries (max 5 per tenant). The response includes a signing secret shown once.

get.description: Returns all registered webhook endpoints for the account.

patch.description: Changes an endpoint's URL, subscribed events, or active state. Toggling is how you re-enable an endpoint the circuit breaker disabled after 10 consecutive failures.

delete.description: Deletes a webhook endpoint and all associated delivery logs.

get.description: Returns all webhook delivery attempts, newest first.

post.description: Immediately re-attempts a failed webhook delivery.

get.description: Returns every active member plus every unaccepted invitation. The tenant owner is a member too, with role owner.

post.description: Sends an email invite with a link to accept-invite on the dashboard. The token is valid for 72 hours.

patch.description: Changes what a team member is allowed to do.

delete.description: Removes a team member's access. The workspace owner cannot be removed this way.
Cancels a pending invitation before it is accepted. The invite link stops working immediately.

post.description: Public endpoint. Called by the accept-invite page when an invited teammate sets their name and password. After this succeeds, the new member logs in through the normal POST /v1/auth/login.

get.description: Every admin action (invite, role change, removal) writes one row here with who did it, from what IP, and when.
Returns the customer and all non-cancelled subscriptions (each enriched with its plan), for the customer identified by the portal token.

post.description: Customer self-service cancel. Always cancels at period end.
Customer self-service pause.
Customer self-service resume of a paused subscription.
The primary integration endpoint. Finds or creates the customer, starts the subscription, creates a Nomba checkout session, and returns the checkout URL — all in one call.

get.description: Returns all customers for the account.

post.description: Creates a customer. The checkout endpoint creates customers automatically — use this only to pre-create one.

get.description: Fetches a single customer by Tori ID.
Generates a short-lived (1 hour) portal token. Redirect the customer to /portal?token=... so they can manage their own subscription.

post.description: Creates a pricing plan. Create once, any number of customers can subscribe.

get.description: Fetches a single plan by ID.

post.description: Creates a subscription for an existing customer and plan without a Nomba checkout session. Use POST /v1/platform/checkout for new signups instead.

get.description: Fetches a single subscription by ID.

post.description: Permanently cancels a subscription by default at period end; pass immediate:true to revoke access now.
Pauses billing. No charges fire until resumed.
Resumes a paused subscription.
Manually moves a SUSPENDED subscription back to ACTIVE.

patch.description: Changes the subscription's plan mid-cycle with exact proration.

post.description: Generates a fresh Nomba checkout URL for a subscription with no payment method on file yet.
Refunds a subscription's most recent paid charge through Nomba and records a REFUND ledger entry.

Receives payment_success and payment_failed events from Nomba. Verified with HMAC-SHA256 using the nomba-signature header and deduplicated by requestId via Redis (24-hour TTL). Not called by integrators directly — this is Nomba calling Tori.

get.description: Nomba probes this URL with a GET request when a webhook endpoint is first registered, to confirm it resolves.
Bare liveness check for container orchestration. Always returns 200 if the process is running.
Bare readiness check for container orchestration.
Identical to GET /v1/status. No authentication required — judges and monitoring tools can verify liveness without credentials.
Returns API status, database pool stats, job queue depth, and runtime memory stats. No authentication required.
